data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin prices steady as Bitcoin hits $87,000. 93,477 traders liquidated in 24 hrs for $244.46M. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $175.3M outflows.
data.description: Heading into the final weekend of 2025, Bitcoin remained mostly level around $87,000 as investors exercised caution due to low trading volume and selling driven by taxes. The latest cryptocurrency prices were Bitcoin at $87,351.16, Ethereum at $2,923.07, Solana at $122.01, XRP at $1.84, Dogecoin at $0.1221, and Shiba Inu at $0.057119. Recent data from Coinglass revealed that in the past 24 hours, 93,477 traders were liquidated, resulting in losses totaling $244.46 million. Additionally, SoSoValue data indicated net outflows of $175.3 million from spot Bitcoin ETFs on Wednesday.

data.title: Azazie to host one-day bridal pop-up in San Diego on Dec. 27, 2025, dresses up to 85% off.
data.description: On December 27, 2025, Azazie will be hosting a pop-up shopping event in San Diego, bringing their sought-after shopping experience to brides-to-be and bridal parties. Attendees will have the opportunity to explore and try on wedding, bridesmaid, and formal dresses in person. This exclusive event will cater to individuals looking for the perfect dress for their special occasion.

data.title: Telcoin launches eUSD stablecoin after approval; minted $10 million, aimed at retail markets on Ethereum and Polygon.
data.description: Telcoin Digital Asset Bank recently received approval from the Nebraska Department of Banking and Finance to begin its blockchain banking operations. As a result, Telcoin has launched its eUSD stablecoin on both the Ethereum and Polygon blockchains. The minting of $10 million worth of eUSD marks a significant milestone for Telcoin, bringing its flagship Digital Cash stablecoin closer to retail markets. The company is excited to kick off this initiative and is moving forward with its plans to expand further.

data.title: JPMorgan's CEO Jamie Dimon criticized Bitcoin as 'ponzi' in 2025, yet JPMorgan launched a $100 million Ethereum fund amidst his skepticism.
data.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. CEO Jamie Dimon continued to express skepticism towards Bitcoin in 2025, despite the company launching a $100 million Ethereum fund. Dimon, known as a prominent crypto skeptic, made various remarks throughout the year regarding Bitcoin, claiming it has no inherent value and is associated with illicit activities like sex trafficking and money laundering. He even likened owning Bitcoin to smoking, stating that while JPMorgan clients can invest in digital assets, the bank will not offer custody services for them. In contrast to Dimon's personal views, JPMorgan has been actively building its crypto infrastructure.

data.title: Sandisk, Palantir, Micron and gold miners top 100 best stocks of 2025 with strong fundamentals.
data.description: In 2025, a list of the top 100 stocks included companies with strong fundamentals like Palantir and Micron. Alongside these tech firms, gold miners also stood out. Notable mentions on the list were Sandisk, Palantir, and Micron. This information was reported recently, indicating the successful performance of these companies in the stock market.

data.title: Stock of Build-A-Bear Workshop gets RS rating upgrade to 75, showing technical improvement. Will it sustain?
data.description: Build-A-Bear Workshop has seen an increase in its Relative Strength Rating, reaching a score of 75. This upgrade indicates improving technical performance for the company. Investors are now questioning whether this positive trend will continue for Build-A-Bear Workshop stock in the future.

data.title: Moderna stock shows improving performance with upgraded IBD Relative Strength Rating.
data.description: Moderna's stock has demonstrated an increase in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The company's robust performance has earned it recognition for its healthy relative strength.

data.title: Aave founder denies buying tokens to sway failed DAO vote after uproar in community about Aave DAO and Aave Labs.
data.description: After an intense backlash within the Aave community, Stani Kulechov addressed concerns regarding the connection between the Aave decentralized autonomous organization and Aave Labs.

data.title: Bitcoin remained strong in 2025, but changing global conditions limited its growth. Will 2026 bring a shift?
data.description: In 2025, Bitcoin demonstrated resilience with its technical and onchain market structure. Despite this, the cryptocurrency faced limitations in price growth due to constantly changing macroeconomic factors. The question now lingers: could there be a shift in this trend for Bitcoin in 2026?

data.title: AST Spacemobile's stock fell after successful India launch of BlueBird 6 satellite; retreat from high on Wednesday.
data.description: AST Spacemobile effectively launched its BlueBird 6 rocket from India on Tuesday evening. Following this achievement, the company's stock experienced a decline the next day. The article titled "AST Spacemobile Retreats After Successful India Launch" can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: In 2025, top 5 crypto airdrops gave users billions in free tokens. Check out the largest giveaways.
data.description: In 2025, cryptocurrency users received substantial amounts of "free money" through token airdrops, totaling billions in value. The year saw numerous significant airdrops, offering users a chance to accumulate wealth through no-cost tokens.
